steps.title: Identify the appositive structure
steps.content: The phrase “a fictionalized account of the lives of the Mirabal [blank]” is an appositive that describes the novel. It's already introduced by a comma after “Butterflies.” The main verb “can serve” follows the blank immediately.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule for appositives
steps.content: When an appositive is introduced by a comma, it must be closed by a comma before the main clause, so “sisters,” provides the required closing comma. Options A and B add “and,” which has nothing parallel to connect, while option D omits the closing comma entirely. That matches choice C — C is correct.
